description: Machine-readable Alembic internal layer contract (P2 AD3, Core CO2 pattern). Codifies the AS-IS lib/ cross-area runtime import graph derived on 2026-06-12 via scripts/lint-layer-contract.mjs --report at baseline 9bcc272 (194 runtime edges, 49 type-only bridges) — the contract records reality; redesigns go through controller-decided waves. Enforced by scripts/lint-layer-contract.mjs as a blocking step in npm run check. Imports resolve through both relative specifiers and the package.json '#alias/*' subpath map.
typeOnlyNote: import type / export type imports are type bridges and do not create runtime coupling; runtime imports must follow allowedRuntimeImports.
layerRationale: Base leaves (import nothing or shared only): shared, types, platform, infrastructure, governance, project-scope, repository, sandbox, generated.
Mid: service (domain orchestration over daemon contracts/infrastructure), tools (host adapters over sandbox), workflows (cold-start/rescan flows over service).

Injection is the DI/composition area: it wires daemon, repositories, services, and tools; many areas also reach INTO it via the service-locator pattern (getAiRuntimeStatus/getServiceContainer) — those reach-through edges are codified as-is here and are AD4 remediation scope, not silently legal forever.

Hosts: http, resident, daemon, cli sit on top and may reach the areas they observably consume; lib/Bootstrap.ts ('root') is the composition entry with a wildcard, and cli may invoke it (SetupService bootstraps the app). resident additionally consumes the relocated rate-limit infrastructure leaf (AD4).
generated holds committed codegen artifacts (dashboard api-types) and imports nothing.

cycleFindings.majority: http -> resident (3 edges: route modules invoke resident handlers)
cycleFindings.minority: resident -> http (0 edges — remediated: RateLimiter relocated to infrastructure/rate-limit, both handlers consume it downward)
cycleFindings.status: RESOLVED 2026-06-12 (AD4 ta10): the rate limiter moved out of the http host area to lib/infrastructure/rate-limit/RecipeSaveRateLimiter.ts with a managed lifecycle; resident -> infrastructure is a plain downward edge; both blessed exceptions removed — the cycle no longer exists

cycleFindings.minority: service -> injection (0 edges — remediated; type-only bridge remains, exempt)
cycleFindings.status: RESOLVED 2026-06-12 (AD4 ta10): ModuleService takes an aiStatus provider via constructed injection; the service -> injection runtime edge and its blessed exception are gone

cycleFindings.minority: tools -> injection (0 edges — remediated; type-only bridges remain, exempt)
cycleFindings.status: RESOLVED 2026-06-12 (AD4 ta10): DashboardOperations handlers are built by createDashboardOperationHandlers(deps) with the AI-status helpers injected; the tools -> injection runtime edge and its blessed exception are gone

cycleFindings: W0 2026-07-02 回写:S4 四环搬迁(19732a0)后契约对齐现实。已声明但待 W5 收紧:daemon->workflows(DaemonJobRunner 抓 project-context 事实层,project-facts 合并后消)、recipe-pipeline->workflows(7 边同上)、recipe-pipeline->injection(service-locator reach-through 2 边,AD4 续)、workflows->infrastructure(ProjectContextWorkflowFacts 直连 sqlite)。

W5 2026-07-03 回写:W0 注记四项收口——daemon->workflows 与 recipe-pipeline->workflows 全消(B1 project-facts 合并+B2 workflows 目录清算,workflows 区已删除);workflows->infrastructure 随区消失(ProjectContextWorkflowFacts 直连 sqlite 现为 project-facts->infrastructure 1 边,合法声明);recipe-pipeline->injection 保留 (CompletionFinalizer #inject 动态 reach-through 随迁入 generate/completion 计入本区,AD4 服务定位收敛另行立项)。B4 落 RecipePipelineFacade:daemon 调 pipeline 收拢单入口,事件订阅切 RECIPE_PIPELINE_EVENTS 常量。
